{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035939A7D646F150AB45486697"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588370483944506174","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"值得一看值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766808173,"group_id":"7584928226535820313","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/v1Oqsq9uiQxNwsp/wKgc6yUiA6/C2o9UT+YvgkByP5","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2494131437316735","user_name":"爱吃酥肉炖菜的厉晚雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2494131437316735","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7584928226535820313","book_info":{"abstract":"天元宗外门弟子张天阳，修为卡在炼气一层好几年了，始终都没有寸进。这样的修为，在外门弟子中属于垫底的存在。
要知道，天元宗的杂役弟子达到练气期一层就可以晋升为外门弟子。
张天阳自从晋升到外门，修为就卡住了。
渐渐的他就成了天元宗的一个笑话。
修为没有长进，他也没有办法。
偏偏，他又得了一种查不出原因的疾病，最后，一口气就完了下去，被扔到了宗门后山的乱葬岗。
就在他要被群狼撕咬的那一刻，一道霹雳闪电就劈了下来，几头饿狼被劈死，其他的饿狼吓得逃走。
张天阳突然坐了起来……
他又活了过来……
他有了系统……
他觉醒了仙魂……
然后他无敌了……
然后，他不再隐忍……
然后，张天阳就在修仙界横着走了……
都无敌了，谁还扮猪吃老虎？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/7c5a15ecd5a46fb01ec74883eabd7776~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"花野村夫","author_id":"","book_id":"7584928226535820313","book_name":"都无敌了，谁还扮猪吃老虎","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7584939475010650649","read_count":"8","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"129160"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"58","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,东方玄幻,系统,穿书,多女主,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7c5a15ecd5a46fb01ec74883eabd7776~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307179&x-signature=yRlXt9grvh2vzEWBsGI%2F0Yd17Z0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"92478539450","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"49"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322035939A7D646F150AB45486697"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_
